content.text:
Based on the image provided, I can clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 26 (C:26):

- C:25 (carbon) - connected to the left
- C:27 (carbon) - connected downward
- H:30 (hydrogen) - connected to the right
- H:31 (hydrogen) - connected upward

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 4747, as indicated by the filename "geomconf_4747.xyz".

So the neighbor atoms of C:26 are:
- Atom index 25 (C)
- Atom index 27 (C)
- Atom index 30 (H)
- Atom index 31 (H)

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 26, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
